summary: Completed backend testing of voucher system with backup codes. Most critical features working correctly (93.3% success rate).

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.impact: QR validation with backup codes fails, blocking establishment validation flow
critical_bugs.details: ValueError: ObjectId object is not iterable - response contains non-serializable MongoDB ObjectId fields
critical_bugs.error_log: TypeError('ObjectId' object is not iterable), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')

working_features.feature: Backup code generation in ITK-XXX format

passed_tests: QR generation with backup code in ITK-XXX format
GET /api/vouchers/my returns client vouchers with required fields
Sales records contain required fields (credits_used, amount_to_pay_cash)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in /api/qr/validate endpoint. The validation logic is working but response serialization fails. Need to exclude '_id' fields or convert ObjectIds to strings in the response.
